homepage.heroTitle: Custom Joinery & Kitchen Renovations in Sydney
homepage.heroDescription: Built around your layout, storage needs and how your home needs to function every day. From custom kitchens to wardrobes, laundries and joinery-led renovation scopes, we deliver tailored cabinetry backed by real Sydney project experience.

services.title: Core joinery and kitchen renovation services across Sydney.
services.intro: We focus on kitchens, custom joinery, wardrobes, laundries and renovation-led cabinetry that improve layout, storage, flow and finish quality — with a clear next step for quoting.

cardCopy.kitchens-renovations: Custom kitchens and renovation-led cabinetry planned around layout, storage, finish quality and how the home needs to function day to day.
cardCopy.custom-joinery: Murphy beds, hallway storage, living room cabinetry, study nooks and tailored solutions for awkward spaces that standard cabinetry cannot solve cleanly.
cardCopy.wardrobes: Built-ins and walk-ins with smarter internal planning, cleaner finishes and storage that works harder every day.
cardCopy.laundry: Compact and full-size laundries with integrated appliances, tall storage, concealed utility zones and better overall flow.
cardCopy.renovations: Joinery-led renovation scopes that connect kitchens, laundries, wardrobes and selected bathroom-ready planning into one cohesive result.

featuredProjects.title: Selected projects completed across Sydney suburbs.
featuredProjects.intro: Explore real project pages showing the rooms involved, the joinery scope, the finish decisions and the suburb each project belongs to.

whyChoose.title: Tailored joinery, clearer quoting and better-finished rooms.
whyChoose.intro: We focus on tailored cabinetry, renovation-ready planning and finishes that feel integrated into the home — not generic solutions forced into the space.
